## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style of the rest of the project
- [ ] I ran `luacheck` locally and it passes (or CI will tell me)
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] I updated docs in `docs/` if behavior changed
- [ ] I tested in-game, not just on paper
